seniority.level: Mid to Senior IC (wide band, explicitly open to early-career to experienced)
level_signals: Comp range $130K-$230K USD suggests wide seniority band
JD explicitly states 'We welcome applicants with diverse backgrounds, from early-career rising stars to experienced leaders'
Roles and responsibilities will be tailored to your strengths, interests, and growth trajectory

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in growth, product management, or product marketing, especially in AI, SaaS, voice technology, or developer platforms
Basic-level understanding of HTML/CSS and SQL
Able to take data-driven insights and customer needs to effectively message to customers, aligning high-impact growth initiatives with product roadmap
Strategic thinking paired with hands-on execution ability
Excitement to work in a fast-paced, ambiguous startup environment
Passion for AI, voice, or building technologies that improve human well-being

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in software engineering, product management, technical education, or UI/UX design
Interest/background in the creator economy or working with creators
Experience with APIs or AI/ML technologies

scope.surface: TTS and voice AI products (Octave, EVI); growth for content creators and developers
scope.business_model: B2B and B2C API/platform, Series B startup
primary_metrics_inferred: Growth from organic and paid social campaigns
core_responsibilities: Identify opportunities to strategize and execute around increasing product growth
Partner with Design and Engineering to align growth initiatives with product direction and user needs
Conduct research, gather user feedback, analyze competitive insights to align product marketing with user use-cases and uncover pain-points/barriers to adoption
Analyze, optimize, and A/B test marketing materials for creators and developers
Run and analyze both organic and paid social media campaigns

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($130K-$230K) indicating salary transparency
Explicitly open to both early-career and experienced candidates
Roles tailored to candidate strengths and growth trajectory
Clear product surface: TTS and voice AI for creators and developers
Series B company with named products (Octave, EVI) and measurable technical benchmarks
Mission-driven company with published research and ethical AI guidelines
red_flags: Location not stated anywhere in the JD — remote, hybrid, or onsite status is completely unclear
Very wide compensation band ($100K spread) may indicate uncertainty about seniority level or role scope
Requirements framed as 'some combination of the following' — hard vs. soft distinctions are ambiguous throughout
No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or work authorization
Equity not mentioned despite being a startup

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and explicit JD language about openness to all levels)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and Series B context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated)
compensation.equity_mentioned (inferred as false; not referenced in JD)
ambiguities: Requirements are introduced as 'some combination of the following' — making it difficult to classify any single item as a strict hard requirement; all must_haves reflect JD language but the framing is softer than typical 'Required' sections
The wide seniority band and tailored responsibilities language make seniority level highly ambiguous
No location or remote work information is provided; could be fully remote, hybrid, or onsite
